response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements made during the game's redevelopment. Although we achieved a nearly doubled frame rate through optimization enhancements, the integration of new hardware-intensive features such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands introduces performance challenges. We aim to maintain a balance between these elements.  
Picture #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the updated game, each character has a specific stomach capacity that dictates how much "body fluid" they can accommodate in their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr. Anya can hold 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet is limited to 2800ml. Male test subjects release a varying amount of fluid during climax: a Dreamer typically expels 10-15ml, while an Elder Thing may inject 400-600ml into their partner.  
Picture #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice graphics. The fluid effects are not pre-designed for sexual scenes and instead activate dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy, and stamina levels. Certain character abilities, obtained through experimentation with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or significant squirting.  
Picture #4 and #5 depict dynamic body interactions and skin decals in VR, with hands moving through a VR controller.  
Pictures #6, #7, and #8 present previews of upcoming bondage devices and cooperative sex scenarios. More details will be released in the coming months.  
The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
